title: PDET municipality boundary
description: One document per Colombian municipality. Geometry is a (Multi)Polygon in WGS84 (EPSG:4326), GeoJSON-encoded so MongoDB's 2dsphere index can serve $geoWithin / $geoIntersects.

is_pdet.description: True if this municipality is one of the 170 PDET territories per Decreto 893/2017.

area_sqkm.description: Polygon area in km2, computed in an equal-area projection at load time.

subregion_pdet.description: ART PDET subregion name (one of 16). Null for non-PDET munis.
